meta.title: Situational Awareness Platform
meta.description: Viziblezone turns every smartphone into a safety beacon. Direct device-to-device awareness that detects people beyond line of sight, with zero reliance on cellular infrastructure.

hero.title:
See what
can't be seen
hero.lede: Viziblezone turns every smartphone into a safety beacon. Direct device-to-device awareness detects people beyond line of sight — behind vehicles, walls and blind corners — with zero reliance on cellular infrastructure.
hero.sceneLabel: Live detection · beyond line of sight

problem.title:
The most dangerous
person is the one
you can't see
problem.lede: Cameras, radar and lidar all share one hard limit: line of sight. A child behind a parked van, a worker behind a container, a rider past a blind corner — by the time sensors can see them, it is often too late to react.

stats.text: of pedestrian collisions involve a victim who was obstructed or emerged suddenly
typical reaction window once a hidden pedestrian becomes visible to the driver
infrastructure required — Viziblezone runs on the smartphones people already carry

platform.title:
Every phone,
a beacon
platform.lede: Viziblezone is a software platform that lets ordinary smartphones announce presence, motion and risk directly to nearby vehicles and systems — device to device, in real time, before visual contact is possible.

steps.title: Announce presence
steps.text: A protected phone continuously broadcasts a compact signature: presence, motion and trajectory. Fully anonymous, battery-friendly, no app interaction needed.

steps.title: Device to device
steps.text: Nearby vehicles, phones and systems receive the signal directly — no cell tower, no cloud, no network in between. Signals travel through and around obstructions.

steps.title: Alert before sight
steps.text: An on-device risk engine fuses trajectories and issues a targeted alert seconds before line of sight — enough time to brake, slow down or reroute.

verticalsIntro.title:
One platform,
four battlefields
verticalsIntro.lede: The same awareness layer protects streets, cities, industrial sites and emergency operations. Explore how it deploys in each world.

resilience.quote: Built for the moment networks fail
resilience.lede: Viziblezone's architecture is DMO-inspired — the discipline behind mission-critical communications that emergency and defense forces rely on worldwide. Our team spent decades building it.
bullets: Direct device-to-device communication, no cellular dependency
Keeps working in dead zones, disasters and network collapse
Decentralized by design — no single point of failure
Engineered by veterans of mission-critical communications

cta.title:
Let's make the
invisible visible
cta.lede: Partnerships, pilots, OEM integrations and investment — we'd love to talk.
